server.name: autonomath-mcp
server.display_name: jpcite — 日本の制度 MCP (151 tools)
server.description_short: jpcite: 151-tool MCP over Japanese public-program evidence — 11,601 searchable programs, 2,286 case studies, 181 exclusion/prerequisite rules, 3-axis loan risk, and corporate/invoice lookups. ¥3/billable unit; 3/day free anonymous use.
server.description_long: jpcite provides structured access to Japanese public-program evidence via 151 MCP tools (protocol 2025-06-18): 11,601 searchable programs (補助金/融資/税制/認定), 2,286 採択事例, 108 融資 programs with collateral/guarantor risk fields, 1,185 enforcement cases + 22,258 detail records, e-Gov law metadata, tax rulesets, invoice registrants, court decisions, bids, corporate 360 lookups, and prebuilt evidence packs. Public rows are designed for source-linked retrieval: source_url, fetched_at, content hashes where available, exclusion-rule checks, and cross-dataset joins such as trace_program_to_law / find_cases_by_law / combined_compliance_check. Use it as an evidence pre-fetch layer before answer generation: agents can fetch compact, source-linked JSON instead of assembling the same Japanese public-data joins by hand. Major public rows carry source_url + fetched_at; no aggregator sites are used as sources. Pricing is ¥3/billable unit tax-exclusive (税込目安 ¥3.30); anonymous use allows 3 requests/day per IP (JST reset).

tools_base.name: search_programs
tools_base.summary: Full-text + faceted search over 11,601 searchable Japanese public programs

tools_base.name: get_program
tools_base.summary: Full enriched program detail by unified_id (A–J dims, lineage)

tools_base.name: batch_get_programs
tools_base.summary: Batch-fetch up to 50 programs by unified_id in one round-trip

tools_base.name: check_exclusions
tools_base.summary: Run 181 exclusion/prerequisite rules on a candidate program set

tools_base.name: list_exclusion_rules
tools_base.summary: Enumerate all 181 rules with source_url evidence

tools_base.name: search_case_studies
tools_base.summary: Search 2,286 採択事例 (real acceptance records)

tools_base.name: get_case_study
tools_base.summary: Full 採択事例 detail including applicant + awarded amount + source

tools_base.name: search_loan_programs
tools_base.summary: Search 108 融資 with 3-axis risk filters (担保/個人保証人/第三者保証人)

tools_base.name: get_loan_program
tools_base.summary: Full 融資 detail with 3-axis guarantor decomposition

tools_base.name: search_enforcement_cases
tools_base.summary: Search 1,185 行政処分 cases for due-diligence / fraud detection

tools_base.name: get_enforcement_case
tools_base.summary: Full 行政処分 detail — entity, violation, authority, source

tools_base.name: get_meta
tools_base.summary: Dataset meta — row counts, tier distribution, last-ingest timestamp

tools_base.name: enum_values
tools_base.summary: Live canonical vocabulary for filter fields (pre-empts hallucinated 0-row queries)

tools_base.name: prescreen_programs
tools_base.summary: Ranked pre-screening from caller profile (fuses search + exclusions + amount fit)

tools_base.name: upcoming_deadlines
tools_base.summary: Calendar of 補助金/助成金 deadlines closing within N days

tools_base.name: smb_starter_pack
tools_base.summary: SMB onboarding pack: top subsidies + loans + exclusions + cases + 30/60/90-day deadlines in one call

tools_base.name: subsidy_combo_finder
tools_base.summary: Find non-conflicting subsidy + loan + tax combos for a profile (auto-runs check_exclusions)

tools_base.name: deadline_calendar
tools_base.summary: Deadlines grouped by month for N months ahead, prefecture-aware

tools_base.name: dd_profile_am
tools_base.summary: Due-diligence from houjin_bangou: entity + adoptions + invoice registration + enforcement

tools_base.name: similar_cases
tools_base.summary: Case-study-led discovery: from a seed case_id return up to 20 similar 採択事例

tools_base.name: regulatory_prep_pack
tools_base.summary: Industry+prefecture → laws + certifications + tax rulesets + recent enforcement bundle

tools_base.name: subsidy_roadmap_3yr
tools_base.summary: 3-year timeline of plausibly-applicable subsidy/loan/tax windows, JST FY-quarter bucketed

tools_expansion.name: search_laws
tools_expansion.summary: Search Japanese statutes (e-Gov法令 CC-BY) by name or article text

tools_expansion.name: search_court_decisions
tools_expansion.summary: Search Japanese court decisions by case number, keyword, ruling date

tools_expansion.name: find_precedents_by_statute
tools_expansion.summary: Court decisions citing a given law_id + article

tools_expansion.name: search_bids
tools_expansion.summary: Search national + prefectural tenders (GEPS + 47 都道府県)

tools_expansion.name: bid_eligible_for_profile
tools_expansion.summary: Ranked bid eligibility from bidder profile

tools_expansion.name: search_tax_rules
tools_expansion.summary: Search invoice + e-records rulesets (インボイス/電帳法)

tools_expansion.name: get_tax_rule
tools_expansion.summary: Full tax ruleset detail by rule_id

tools_expansion.name: evaluate_tax_applicability
tools_expansion.summary: Invoice + e-records applicability from transaction profile

tools_expansion.name: search_invoice_registrants
tools_expansion.summary: Search 国税庁 qualified invoice issuer registry (PDL v1.0, re-distributable)

tools_expansion.name: trace_program_to_law
tools_expansion.summary: Trace program statutory basis: unified_id → law_id + article

tools_expansion.name: find_cases_by_law
tools_expansion.summary: Enforcement cases citing a given law_id + article

tools_expansion.name: combined_compliance_check
tools_expansion.summary: Cross-dataset glue: laws + precedents + tax + bids in one call

tools_autonomath.name: search_tax_incentives
tools_autonomath.summary: Search tax measures in autonomath entity-fact DB (税額控除 / 特別償却 / 各種優遇)

tools_autonomath.name: search_certifications
tools_autonomath.summary: Search certification programs (経営力向上 / 先端設備等 / 事業継続力等)

tools_autonomath.name: list_open_programs
tools_autonomath.summary: List currently-open programs with application windows from am_application_round

tools_autonomath.name: enum_values_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Canonical vocabulary for autonomath filter fields (authority / region / industry_jsic etc.)

tools_autonomath.name: search_by_law
tools_autonomath.summary: Find programs/facts anchored to a specific statute in am_law

tools_autonomath.name: active_programs_at
tools_autonomath.summary: Programs active on a given date (snapshot via am_amendment_snapshot)

tools_autonomath.name: related_programs
tools_autonomath.summary: Graph-walk am_relation for programs related to a given entity

tools_autonomath.name: search_acceptance_stats_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Search acceptance statistics / adoption data in autonomath DB

tools_autonomath.name: intent_of
tools_autonomath.summary: Extract the legislative/program intent facet from am_entity_facts

tools_autonomath.name: reason_answer
tools_autonomath.summary: Structured answer skeleton over enabled autonomath facts (gated off unless reasoning is enabled)

tools_autonomath.name: get_am_tax_rule
tools_autonomath.summary: Full detail of an am_tax_rule row by id

tools_autonomath.name: search_gx_programs_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Search GX (green transformation) programs in autonomath DB

tools_autonomath.name: search_loans_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Search loan products in am_loan_product with term/rate/collateral filters

tools_autonomath.name: check_enforcement_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Check enforcement / disqualification in am_enforcement_detail

tools_autonomath.name: search_mutual_plans_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Search mutual insurance plans in am_insurance_mutual

tools_autonomath.name: get_law_article_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Get a specific law article from am_law

tools_autonomath.name: list_tax_sunset_alerts
tools_autonomath.summary: List tax incentives whose effective_until expires within N days (default 365)

tools_autonomath.name: get_annotations
tools_autonomath.summary: V4 universal: list public annotation signals attached to an autonomath entity

tools_autonomath.name: validate
tools_autonomath.summary: V4 universal: run all applicable validation rules (6 generic predicates) against a payload

tools_autonomath.name: get_provenance
tools_autonomath.summary: V4 universal: full provenance ledger for an entity (license rollup + every contributing source)

tools_autonomath.name: get_provenance_for_fact
tools_autonomath.summary: V4 universal: provenance for a single am_entity_facts row by fact_id

tools_autonomath.name: list_static_resources_am
tools_autonomath.summary: List static taxonomies (prefecture / industry_jsic / target_profile etc.)

tools_autonomath.name: get_static_resource_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Fetch a single static taxonomy by name

tools_autonomath.name: list_example_profiles_am
tools_autonomath.summary: List canonical example applicant profiles for prescreen grounding

tools_autonomath.name: get_example_profile_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Fetch a single example profile by id

tools_autonomath.name: render_36_kyotei_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Render a 36協定 draft template for eligible accounts; professional review is required before use

tools_autonomath.name: get_36_kyotei_metadata_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Metadata for the 36協定 template (template version, required fields, 労基法 refs)

tools_autonomath.name: deep_health_am
tools_autonomath.summary: Deep health probe for data freshness and core retrieval readiness

datasets.laws: e-Gov法令 CC-BY (9,484 rows, continually loading)
datasets.tax_rulesets: インボイス + 電帳法 (50 rows)
datasets.invoice_registrants: 国税庁 PDL v1.0 (13,801 rows, re-distributable with attribution)

pricing.anonymous_free: 3 req/日 per IP (JST 翌日リセット, no key required)
pricing.metered: ¥3/billable unit tax-exclusive (tax-inclusive amount shown at checkout)

registries.name: Official MCP Registry
registries.notes: Published under io.github.shigetosidumeda-cyber/autonomath-mcp, matching the active GitHub repo. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN with repo:read scope or OIDC from Actions.

registries.name: Smithery
registries.review: daily crawl + manual claim via Smithery dashboard

registries.name: Anthropic DXT / Claude Desktop Extension
registries.notes: No registry submission needed; .mcpb is self-distributing. Bundle built via scripts/build_mcpb.sh.

registries.name: PulseMCP
registries.fallback: manual form if missing after 7 days
registries.notes: Listing appears once Official MCP Registry entry propagates (~1 week).

registries.name: Awesome MCP Servers (punkpeye)
registries.entry_draft: - [jpcite](https://github.com/shigetosidumeda-cyber/autonomath-mcp) 🐍 ☁️ 🍎 🪟 🐧 — jpcite: 151-tool MCP over 11,601 searchable Japanese public programs, 2,286 case studies, 181 exclusion/prerequisite rules, 3-axis loan risk, laws/court/bids/tax/invoice/corporate lookups, and source-linked evidence packets. ¥3/billable unit; 3/day free. `uvx autonomath-mcp`

registries.name: mcpservers.org
registries.notes: Awesome MCP web mirror; may auto-sync from punkpeye PR.

launch_day_checklist.note: verify 24 h after #1; submit form if missing
